notableEvents.label: George Valera reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: George Valera reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jose Altuve.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Brice Matthews out at 2nd. Carlos Correa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: George Valera reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jose Altuve.
